ast.name: error
ast.source: leaves present but no tab groups found
ast.target: 存在叶子但未找到标签页组

ast.name: log
ast.source: No active leaf, so cannot go to next tab
ast.target: 没有活动叶子，因此无法转到下一个标签页

ast.name: log
ast.source: No active file; not sure if this is is unexpected; won't change view
ast.target: 没有活动文件；不确定这是否意外；不会更改视图

ast.name: log
ast.source: 0 or 1 leaves; no next/prev tab to go to
ast.target: 0 或 1 个叶子；没有下一个/上一个标签页可跳转

ast.name: log
ast.source: No active leaf, so cannot move tab to next group
ast.target: 没有活动的叶子，因此无法将标签页移动到下一个组

ast.name: log
ast.source: No active file, can't determine what to open in new tab
ast.target: 没有活动文件，无法确定在新标签页中打开什么

ast.name: log
ast.target: 0 或 1 个叶子；没有可移动的内容

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move tab to the next tab group
ast.target: 将标签页移动到下一个标签页组

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move tab to the prev tab group
ast.target: 将标签页移动到上一个标签页组
